property.name: java.library.path
property.value: C:\Users\super\.jdks\openjdk-23.0.2\bin;C:\WINDOWS\Sun\Java\bin;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\WINDOWS\System32\Wbem;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\WINDOWS\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files\NVIDIA Corporation\NVIDIA app\NvDLISR;C:\Program Files (x86)\NVIDIA Corporation\PhysX\Common;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Program Files\Docker\Docker\resources\bin;C:\Program Files\nodejs\;C:\Program Files\PuTTY\;C:\Users\super\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Launcher\;C:\Program Files\MySQL\MySQL Shell 8.0\bin\;C:\Users\super\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\super\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code\bin;C:\Program Files\MySQL\MySQL Router 8.0\bin;C:\Users\super\AppData\Roaming\npm;C:\Program Files\apache-maven-3.9.10\bin;;.

testcase.name: Successful login with valid credentials

Given the user is on the login page # steps.LoginSteps.the_user_is_on_the_login_page() When the user enters username "tomsmith" and password "SuperSecretPassword!" # steps.LoginSteps.the_user_enters_username_and_password(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) And the user clicks the login button # steps.LoginSteps.the_user_clicks_the_login_button() Then the user should be redirected to the secure area # steps.LoginSteps.the_user_should_be_redirected_to_the_secure_area() And a success "You logged into a secure area!" should be displayed # steps.LoginSteps.a_success_message_should_be_displayed(java.lang.String) java.lang.NullPointerException: Cannot invoke "org.openqa.selenium.WebDriver.quit()" because "this.driver" is null at steps.SearchSteps.tearDown(SearchSteps.java:57)

Given I am on the Google search page # steps.SearchSteps.i_am_on_the_google_search_page() When I search for "GitHub" # steps.SearchSteps.i_search_for(java.lang.String) Then I should see "GitHub" in the results # steps.SearchSteps.i_should_see_in_the_results(java.lang.String) java.lang.NullPointerException: Cannot invoke "org.openqa.selenium.WebDriver.quit()" because "this.driver" is null at steps.SearchSteps.tearDown(SearchSteps.java:57)

testcase.name: Search for a term
testcase.error: java.lang.NullPointerException: Cannot invoke "org.openqa.selenium.WebDriver.quit()" because "this.driver" is null at steps.SearchSteps.tearDown(SearchSteps.java:57)
